ItacPersonItem.Notes: Rector of the parish of San Pietro a Marciano, and founder of the Fanfalini Academy. ee maylender, vol. 2, p. 343. Maylender quotes Curzio Mazzi, La Congrega dei Rozzi, vol. 1, Appendix II, and vol. 2 Appendix V. Mariani`s manuscript verses are preserved in the Library of Siena.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
